name: Inferno of the Ashened
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>灰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>滅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>劫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>火</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: You can place 1 "Obsidim, the Ashened City" from your Deck, face-up in either Field Zone. You can target 1 face-up card your opponent controls and 1 Level 8 or higher DARK Pyro monster in your GY; send that card on the field to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon that other monster from your GY to your opponent's field in Defense Position. You can only use this effect of "Inferno of the Ashened" once per turn. You can only activate 1 "Inferno of the Ashened" per turn.
eff: When this card is activated: You can place 1 "Obsidim, the Ashened City" from your Deck, face-up in either Field Zone. You can target 1 face-up card your opponent controls and 1 Level 8 or higher DARK Pyro monster in your GY; send that card on the field to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon that other monster from your GY to your opponent's field in Defense Position. You can only use this effect of "Inferno of the Ashened" once per turn. You can only activate 1 "Inferno of the Ashened" per turn.

action: Places cards from your Deck in your Field Zone
Places cards from your Deck in your opponent's Field Zone
Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons from your Graveyard to your opponent's field
